# PHAssetCollectionSubtype.albumCloudShared

**Case**

An iCloud Shared Photo Stream.

## Declaration

```swift
case albumCloudShared
```

## Cloud Album Types

- **PHAssetCollectionSubtype.albumMyPhotoStream**: The user’s personal iCloud Photo Stream.
